name: 违规词·发帖前合规检查
tagline: 跟免費齊全、持續更新的詞庫對比，沒問題再上架；開箱即用，不用自己加詞
description: Compare your draft against multiple free, comprehensive, up-to-date wordlists (CN/EN, ad law, platform rules). Pass = safe to post. No need to add or maintain wordlists—ready out of the box. Outputs pass/fail, hits by source, compliance tips, optional Markdown report.
